docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPECK CAB CO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, DEKE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SPECK CAB CO DEFENDANT'S RECOVERY IS LIMITED TO THE COST OF REPAIR, PLUS A RESONABLE PERIOD OF LOSS OF USE. HOWEVER ADDITIONAL DAMAGES FOR DIMINISHED VALUE ARE NOT AVAILABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, DEKE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECK CAB CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
